de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent

Class NodeChangeJournal

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent.NodeChangeJournal
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GoalListener

    public class NodeChangeJournal
extends Object
implements GoalListener
    Collect changes applied to a node during a given period of time

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableMap<Node,NodeChangesHolder> changes
      This is a may storing the leaves that are currently below the original node, and all changes applied to each of them
      private Node node
      The original node
      private Proof proof 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      NodeChangeJournal(Proof p_proof, Goal p_goal) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void automaticStateChanged(Goal source, boolean oldAutomatic, boolean newAutomatic)
      Informs the listener that the automatic state Goal.isAutomatic() has changed.
      private NodeChangesHolder getChangeObj(Node p_node) 
      RuleAppInfo getRuleAppInfo(RuleApp p_ruleApp)
      Create an RuleAppInfo object containing all changes stored within this object; remove all listeners
      void goalReplaced(Goal source, Node parent, ImmutableList<Goal> newGoals)
      Informs the listener that the given goal source has been replaced by the goals newGoals (note that source may be an element of newGoals).
      private void putChangeObj(Node p_node, NodeChangesHolder p_obj) 
      private NodeChangesHolder removeChangeObj(Node p_node) 
      void sequentChanged(Goal source, SequentChangeInfo sci)
      informs the listener about a change that occured to the sequent of goal

        private ImmutableMap<Node,NodeChangesHolder> changes

    • Constructor Detail

      • NodeChangeJournal

        public NodeChangeJournal(Proof p_proof,
                 Goal p_goal)
        Parameters:
        p_goal - the original goal/node

    • Method Detail

      • getRuleAppInfo

        public RuleAppInfo getRuleAppInfo(RuleApp p_ruleApp)
        Create an RuleAppInfo object containing all changes stored within this object; remove all listeners

      • sequentChanged

        public void sequentChanged(Goal source,
                  SequentChangeInfo sci)
        informs the listener about a change that occured to the sequent of goal
        Specified by:
        sequentChanged in interface GoalListener

      • goalReplaced

        public void goalReplaced(Goal source,
                Node parent,
                ImmutableList<Goal> newGoals)
        Informs the listener that the given goal source has been replaced by the goals newGoals (note that source may be an element of newGoals). The nodes of newGoals are children of the node parent
        Specified by:
        goalReplaced in interface GoalListener

      • putChangeObj

        private void putChangeObj(Node p_node,
                NodeChangesHolder p_obj)

      • getChangeObj

        private NodeChangesHolder getChangeObj(Node p_node)

      • removeChangeObj

        private NodeChangesHolder removeChangeObj(Node p_node)

      • automaticStateChanged

        public void automaticStateChanged(Goal source,
                         boolean oldAutomatic,
                         boolean newAutomatic)
        Description copied from interface: GoalListener
        Informs the listener that the automatic state Goal.isAutomatic() has changed.
        Specified by:
        automaticStateChanged in interface GoalListener
        Parameters:
        source - The changed Goal.
        oldAutomatic - The old state.
        newAutomatic - The new state.
